categories.name: missing_code_navigation
categories.evidence: Task involved tracing an interface through 7 implementations. Agent had no code-nav tools and manually read only 3 of 7 implementing classes. has_code_nav_tools=false, benchmark matches crossrepo/tracing pattern.

categories.name: incomplete_solution
categories.evidence: Reward=0.3 — agent modified 3 of 7 required files.

annotations.notes: Exemplar: missing code navigation on a cross-repo tracing task. Partial solution because agent could not discover all implementations.
